name: open-source
tagline: Dispatch table routing Claude to browser-use open-source Python library docs by topic (Agent, Browser, Tools, MCP, monitoring).
verdict: Same solid pattern as its cloud sibling: concrete triggers, two explicit negative triggers, compact SKILL.md deferring bulk material to on-demand references. Weak spots: no version/changelog signal, a 688-char wall-of-topics description, and an unpinned `browser-use` install from PyPI.

highlights.summary: Well-known package installed unpinned from the standard PyPI registry.
Description runs ~688 chars across lines 4-13, a feature-list wall past the ~500-char guidance.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
